title: parasenecio auriculatus var. bulbiferus
intro: Parasenecio auriculatus var. bulbiferus, also known as the bulb-bearing parasenecio, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestive health, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often harvested and used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
